message.content:
Execute the UI foundation overhaul for the IT Asset Management System at `/Users/admin/it-asset/`. This is Phase 1 foundational work — theme, layout, new components, accessibility. Do NOT modify any page files (under `app/` except `app/layout.tsx` and `app/globals.css`). ## Work to do ### 1. THEME OVERHAUL — `app/globals.css` **Read the file first**, then modify the `:root` and `.dark` CSS variable blocks: In `:root`: - `--primary`: change from `oklch(0.205 0 0)` to `oklch(0.45 0.18 250)` (professional blue) - `--primary-foreground`: keep `oklch(0.985 0 0)` - `--ring`: change from `oklch(0.708 0 0)` to `oklch(0.55 0.18 250)` (match primary hue) - `--chart-1` through `--chart-5`: replace the achromatic ramp with a blue-to-emerald spectral ramp: - `--chart-1`: `oklch(0.55 0.18 250)` (blue) - `--chart-2`: `oklch(0.55 0.15 200)` (teal) - `--chart-3`: `oklch(0.55 0.13 160)` (green) - `--chart-4`: `oklch(0.60 0.14 90)` (amber) - `--chart-5`: `oklch(0.50 0.15 330)` (purple) In `.dark`: - `--primary`: change from `oklch(0.922 0 0)` to `oklch(0.65 0.16 240)` (lighter blue for dark mode contrast) - `--ring`: change to `oklch(0.60 0.16 240)` - `--chart-1` through `--chart-5`: same as light but slightly lighter chroma ### 2. STATUS COLOR TOKENS — `app/globals.css` Add these CSS custom properties to BOTH `:root` and `.dark` blocks (same values, they're semantic): ```css --status-green: oklch(0.65 0.16 160); --status-blue: oklch(0.60 0.17 245); --status-teal: oklch(0.60 0.12 180); --status-yellow: oklch(0.70 0.14 85); --status-orange: oklch(0.62 0.14 65); --status-purple: oklch(0.55 0.15 290); --status-red: oklch(0.55 0.20 20); ``` Also add them to the `@theme inline` block so they're available as Tailwind utilities: ``` --color-status-green: var(--status-green); --color-status-blue: var(--status-blue); --color-status-teal: var(--status-teal); --color-status-yellow: var(--status-yellow); --color-status-orange: var(--status-orange); --color-status-purple: var(--status-purple); --color-status-red: var(--status-red); ``` ### 3. PAGE FADE-IN ANIMATION — `app/globals.css` Add at the end of the file: ```css @keyframes page-in { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } ``` ### 4. LAYOUT FIX — `components/layout/app-layout.tsx` Read the file first. - Change line 75: `
{children}
` → `
{children}
` - Add skip-to-content link BEFORE the sidebar (as first child of the outer flex container): ```tsx 跳转到主内容 ``` - Add `id="main-content"` to the `
` tag - Wrap `{children}` in the main tag with: `
{children}
` ### 5. SIDEBAR ACCESSIBILITY — `components/layout/sidebar.tsx` Read the file first. - Find the active nav item rendering (around line 118-135). Add `aria-current="page"` to the `` element when it's the active item. - Add `transition-colors duration-150` to all nav item links ### 6. FIX ASSET STATUS BADGE — `components/asset-status-badge.tsx` Read the file first. Update the color mapping to use the new CSS status tokens and unify the color scheme: | Status | Badge variant | className | |--------|--------------|-----------| | IN_STOCK | secondary | (default) | | AVAILABLE | default | `bg-status-green/10 text-status-green hover:bg-status-green/20 dark:text-status-green` | | ASSIGNED | default | `bg-status-blue/10 text-status-blue hover:bg-status-blue/20 dark:text-status-blue` | | IN_USE | default | `bg-status-teal/10 text-status-teal hover:bg-status-teal/20 dark:text-status-teal` | | RETURNING | outline | `border-status-yellow text-status-yellow` | | REPAIRING | outline | `border-status-orange text-status-orange` | | TRANSFERRING | outline | `border-status-purple text-status-purple` | | LOST | destructive | (default destructive styling) | | SCRAPPED | secondary | (default muted) | Use `className` prop on the `` component, combining variant and custom class. ### 7. FIX EMPTY STATE ACCESSIBILITY — `components/empty-state.tsx` Read the file first. Add `role="status"` to the outer container div. ### 8. CREATE SELECT COMPONENT — `components/ui/select.tsx` Create a Select component based on @base-ui/react/menu primitives (same approach as dropdown-menu.tsx and dialog.tsx). First read `components/ui/dropdown-menu.tsx` to understand the @base-ui/react/menu pattern, then create: ```tsx "use client" import * as React from "react" import { Menu } from "@base-ui/react/menu" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" function SelectTrigger({ className, children, ...props }: React.ComponentProps) { return ( {children} ) } // ... SelectContent, SelectItem, Select (root), SelectValue ``` The component should have: - `Select` (root, wraps Menu.Root) - `SelectTrigger` (Menu.Trigger, styled like Input) - `SelectValue` (displays placeholder or selected value) - `SelectContent` (Menu.Popup, positioned below trigger) - `SelectItem` (Menu.Item, individual option) - `SelectGroup` (Menu.Group, optional grouping) - `SelectLabel` (Menu.GroupLabel, group label) Use lucide-react `ChevronDown` icon for the trigger indicator. ### 9. CREATE PAGE HEADER COMPONENT — `components/page-header.tsx` ```tsx import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" interface PageHeaderProps { title: string description?: string actions?: React.ReactNode className?: string } export function PageHeader({ title, description, actions, className }: PageHeaderProps) { return (

{title}

{description &&

{description}

}
{actions &&
{actions}
}
) } ``` ### 10. CREATE TICKET STATUS BADGE — `components/ticket-status-badge.tsx` ```tsx import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge" interface TicketStatusBadgeProps { status: string className?: string } const ticketStatusMap: Record = { SUBMITTED: { label: "已提交", variant: "secondary" }, PENDING_MANAGER_1: { label: "待主管审批", variant: "default", className: "bg-status-blue/10 text-status-blue dark:text-status-blue" }, PENDING_MANAGER_2: { label: "待上级审批", variant: "default", className: "bg-status-blue/10 text-status-blue dark:text-status-blue" }, PENDING_IT: { label: "待IT处理", variant: "default", className: "bg-status-yellow/10 text-status-yellow dark:text-status-yellow" }, APPROVED: { label: "已通过", variant: "default", className: "bg-status-green/10 text-status-green dark:text-status-green" }, REJECTED: { label: "已驳回", variant: "destructive" }, IN_PROGRESS: { label: "处理中", variant: "default", className: "bg-status-purple/10 text-status-purple dark:text-status-purple" }, COMPLETED: { label: "已完成", variant: "default", className: "bg-status-green/10 text-status-green dark:text-status-green" }, CANCELLED: { label: "已取消", variant: "secondary" }, } export function TicketStatusBadge({ status, className }: TicketStatusBadgeProps) { const config = ticketStatusMap[status] ?? { label: status, variant: "secondary" as const } return ( {config.label} ) } ``` Import `cn` from `@/lib/utils`. ## Important - Read EVERY file before editing it - After all edits, run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify TypeScript - Do NOT modify any page files under `app/` except `app/globals.css`

content.text:
全部完成，TypeScript 零错误。以下是执行汇总：

## 执行汇总

### 1. 主题改造 — `app/globals.css`
- `:root` 中 `--primary` 改为 `oklch(0.45 0.18 250)`（专业蓝色），`--ring` 改为 `oklch(0.55 0.18 250)`
- `.dark` 中 `--primary` 改为 `oklch(0.65 0.16 240)`，`--ring` 改为 `oklch(0.60 0.16 240)`
- `:root` 和 `.dark` 的 `--chart-1` 至 `--chart-5` 替换为蓝至祖母绿光谱色值
- 两区块均新增 7 个 `--status-*` 色值 token
- `@theme inline` 块中新增 `--color-status-*` Tailwind 工具类映射
- 文件末尾添加 `page-in` 关键帧动画

### 2. 布局修复 — `components/layout/app-layout.tsx`
- 移除 `<main>` 上的 `p-6` 内边距
- 添加 `id="main-content"` 到 `<main>`
- `{children}` 用 `animate-[page-in_0.2s_ease-out]` 包裹
- 在侧边栏前添加跳转至主内容链接

### 3. 侧边栏无障碍 — `components/layout/sidebar.tsx`
- 活跃导航项添加 `aria-current="page"`
- 所有导航链接添加 `transition-colors duration-150`

### 4. 资产状态徽章 — `components/asset-status-badge.tsx`
- 将所有颜色值替换为新的 CSS token（`bg-status-green`、`text-status-blue` 等）
- `IN_STOCK` 和 `SCRAPPED` 从 `ghost` 改为统一变体

### 5. 空状态无障碍 — `components/empty-state.tsx`
- 外层容器添加 `role="status"`

### 6. 新建组件 — `components/ui/select.tsx`
- 基于 `@base-ui/react/menu` 原语的 Select 组件，包含 `Select`、`SelectTrigger`、`SelectValue`、`SelectContent`、`SelectItem`、`SelectGroup`、`SelectLabel`、`SelectSeparator`

### 7. 新建组件 — `components/page-header.tsx`
- 包含标题、描述和操作区域插槽的页面标题组件

### 8. 新建组件 — `components/ticket-status-badge.tsx`
- 使用 CSS token 展示工单状态（已提交、待审批、处理中、已完成等）
